_comment: Single source of truth for the wire constants shared across the TypeScript server and the Go harness — values that cross the process boundary (log markers, control sentinels, effort allow-list) and so cannot share a package. The vitest suite (src/lib/wire-contract.test.ts) and the Go suite (agent-harness/cmd/harness/wire_contract_test.go) both assert their in-code constants against this file, so any drift breaks CI instead of production.
_harnessContractVersionComment: Bump by one whenever the server↔harness expectations change in a way that makes an older harness image misbehave (a new env var the harness must honor, a changed callback shape, …). The harness reports its version on the ingest callback; the server compares the last-reported version against this value to warn repo admins running a stale custom agent image.
